name: What if I talked to insurance adjuster about my AI research already?
description: Stop talking, get lawyer—adjusters use AI chats against you.[1]

mainEntity.name: What if I talked to insurance adjuster about my AI research already?

acceptedAnswer.text: Stop talking, get lawyer—adjusters use AI chats against you.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description:
Recorded statements may haunt; AI adds inconsistency risk.[1] Adjusters probe for *Heppner*-style admissions.

**Key factors:**
- Statements binding.
- AI diffs exploitable.
- Lowball offers incoming.

Halt contact, lawyer-up; review statement transcript. Counter with facts.[1] Don't volunteer more.
